purpose: Freeze a bounded promotion gate after the coverage-completion evaluation-only join. The gate decides which claims are allowed after inspecting wrong-goal, wasted-path, map/pose, and evidence-label cross diagnostics.

paper_framing.natural_proof_rule: The evaluation join shows wrong-goal and wasted-path failure surfaces, but also shows that fully covered goal-region/object-relation evidence is not terminal proof. The promotion gate must therefore allow only diagnostic readiness unless a fixed rule can explain and avoid the wrong fully covered case.

expected_command_shape: docker run --rm --user $(id -u):$(id -g) -e HOME=/tmp -e PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 -e PYTHONPYCACHEPREFIX=/tmp/pycache -e PYTHONPATH=/workspace/src -v /home/yoohyun/research3:/workspace:ro -v /home/yoohyun/research3/local_dataset/runs:/runs -w /workspace research3/openvocab-perception:20260513-v3c-gdino-sam2 python -B -m py_compile src/h001_runtime/run_goal_region_object_relation_coverage_completion_promotion_gate.py

docker run --rm --user $(id -u):$(id -g) -e HOME=/tmp -e PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 -e PYTHONPYCACHEPREFIX=/tmp/pycache -e PYTHONPATH=/workspace/src -v /home/yoohyun/research3:/workspace:ro -v /home/yoohyun/research3/local_dataset/runs:/runs -w /workspace research3/openvocab-perception:20260513-v3c-gdino-sam2 python -B -m h001_runtime.run_goal_region_object_relation_coverage_completion_promotion_gate --out-root /runs/h001_goal_region_object_relation_coverage_completion_promotion_gate_v1
next_allowed_step_after_contract: Implement the Docker promotion gate. If the gate passes, close this branch as diagnostic-ready and select the next label-free branch rather than promoting terminal utility.

interpretation_rule.fact: The evaluation join provides wrong-goal, wasted-path, and map/pose diagnostics after evidence rows are frozen.
interpretation_rule.agent_inference: The evidence is useful for failure analysis but not sufficient for a terminal selector because fully covered evidence includes an a_wrong_b_correct row and most rows retain object-relation gaps.
interpretation_rule.paper_claim: Only diagnostic readiness can be promoted. Wrong-goal reduction, wasted-path reduction, map/pose consistency improvement, and paper claims remain blocked.
